title: Better Combat x Fantasy Weapons Compatibility
description: A much updated compatibility datapack for Fantasy Weapons and Better Combat
body:
There is no proper datapack compatibility for [Fantasy Weapons](https://modrinth.com/mod/fantasy_weapons) for [Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat) that goes through ALL weapons in the mod. The ones existing had missing stuff, so I had to make my own.

Feel free to use in modpacks hosted only in Modrinth and/or Curseforge.
